problem id: 851c53be
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10010100 -> 00000100
  11101101 -> 10000111
  10111100 -> 00000101
  00010001 -> 10000000
  01001100 -> 00000010
  01100010 -> 00000011
  01101101 -> 10000011
  00011100 -> 00000000
  00001110 -> 00000000

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 10000101
